basics.name: Divya Sai Aamuktha Pelluri
basics.label: AI Engineer & Researcher
basics.summary: AI Engineer and Researcher with expertise in multi-agent systems, reinforcement learning, robotics, and NLP. Currently working at Optum and Youkti AI, with a strong academic background from SRM Institute and IIT Madras. Passionate about building intelligent systems that solve real-world problems.

work.name: Optum (UnitedHealth Group)
work.summary: Working on healthcare technology solutions and AI-driven automation.
highlights: Completed VACCCP Group ID profile for Virginia, including mapping subscriber classes, eligibility events, Medicaid information, and derived attributes
Implemented error mapping for critical errors and warnings in Blaze rules migration POC
Completed AI Dojo for Generative AI learning program with excellent grade
Attended TDP Boot Camp with hands-on experience in React, Spring Boot, Kubernetes, Terraform, Docker, and CI/CD workflows
Contributed to Rules POC by adding salary object mapping for Tennessee state and creating Alvar eligibility events mapping globally

work.name: Youkti AI
work.summary: Building intelligent agent pipelines and orchestration systems for productivity automation.
highlights: Designed and implemented agent pipelines to analyze Microsoft Teams messages and calendar invites, automatically generating actionable task items
Built and deployed a scheduled AWS Lambda-based orchestration layer to execute multi-agent workflows at scale
Optimized agent workflow execution, reducing end-to-end latency by 5-6 seconds (3-10% improvement) while meeting strict 1-3 minute SLA constraints
Enhanced CDC workflows to support image ingestion by integrating Pinecone-based retrieval with AWS S3 for scalable multimodal data handling

work.name: Düsseldorf Institute of Technology
work.summary: Research on multi-agent reinforcement learning for vehicle-to-grid optimization under Dr. Andreas J. Kassler.
highlights: Designed custom reward function optimizing V2G interactions for SOC, self-consumption, peak load reduction, and carbon minimization
Implemented SAC and MADDPG algorithms for multi-agent demand response
Integrated rule-based safety shield to enforce constraints and reduce critical errors, boosting agent efficiency by 11%
Extended CityLearn simulator with energy sharing mechanism to minimize grid imports and reduce environmental impact

work.name: Nokia
work.summary: Automated testing and optimization of AltiPlano microservices.
highlights: Automated and tested AltiPlano microservices, enhancing reliability and performance
Optimized HostSim launch workflow for scalability and efficiency
Implemented batch migration of intents/devices to streamline simulator network operations

work.name: IIT Dhanbad
work.summary: Research on mining accident analysis using NLP and knowledge graphs under Dr. Siddharth Agarwal.
highlights: Converted unstructured PDF records into structured datasets for analysis
Applied NMF and Cosine Similarity for topic modeling of accident reports
Used graph databases and Protégé ontologies for knowledge representation and trend analysis
Built hybrid RAG system for querying, visualizing, and auto-generating analytical reports
Developed classifier to predict accident codes from natural language descriptions, achieving 80% accuracy

work.name: Samsung R&D Institute
work.summary: Research on multimodal emotion recognition under Dr. Minu R I and Dr. Jotimoroy Karjee.
highlights: Built ECAPA-TDNN-based audio emotion recognition model achieving 97% accuracy on benchmark datasets
Developed body gesture emotion recognition pipeline using LSTM on pose-sequence data
Fused audio and body modalities using Fuzzy Logic, improving overall robustness to 87%
Co-authored and presented research at IEEE CONECCT 2024, IISc Bangalore

work.name: IIT Madras 5G Testbed
work.summary: Developed real-time firmware for 5G mmWave experimentation under Dr. Sankaran Aniruddhan and Dr. Radha Krishna Ganti.
highlights: Developed real-time firmware for C2000 F28388 and TIVA TM4C microcontrollers to acquire and process multi-sensor data
Implemented MQTT-based communication and HTTP scheduler for efficient sensor data transmission to cloud
Worked with RTOS concepts, embedded networking, and serial communication for testbed architecture

volunteer.position: Systems Programming & Computer Engineering Division Lead
volunteer.summary: Led the division for DD ROBOCON 2024, achieving 8th place nationally.
highlights: Built autonomous robot with vision-based perception, grasping, and decision-making for DD ROBOCON 2024 (8th place nationally)
Developed ROS2-based rule-driven AI system integrating NLP and CV for autonomous task execution
Trained YOLOv5 instance segmentation on 7K+ labeled images for real-time object detection
Engineered inverse kinematics, odometry, mapping, and CAN network systems
Implemented low-latency NRF controllers, PID tuning, and real-time sensor-actuator optimization (11th place in 2023)

education.institution: SRM Institute of Science and Technology
highlights: Class Rank 1 (2021-2024)

awards.title: 11th Position in the Country - DD ROBOCON Competition 2023
awards.summary: Achieved 11th place nationally in DD ROBOCON robotics competition.

awards.summary: Secured top 5 position in Standard Chartered Hackathon India.

certificates.name: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure 2024 Certified Foundations Associate

publications.name: Emotion Detection in Multimodal Communication through Audio-Visual Gesture Analysis
publications.summary: Presented research on multimodal emotion recognition combining audio and visual gesture analysis using deep learning techniques. Achieved 97% accuracy on audio emotion recognition and 87% overall robustness through fuzzy logic fusion.

projects.name: UGV Anti-Tank Mine Laying System
projects.summary: Semi-autonomous UGV for anti-tank mine laying operations designed in collaboration with the 19 Engineer Regiment, Indian Army.
highlights: Led an 8-member team to design, fabricate, and field-test a semi-autonomous UGV for anti-tank mine laying
Engineered a three-stage autonomous pipeline: ground excavation, mine placement, and camouflage
Designed full embedded control system enabling autonomous/semi-autonomous operation with 2 km wireless radius
Field-tested in sub-zero conditions in Ladakh, and operational regions in Rajasthan and Punjab
Selected among Top 30 / 260+ innovations at Northern Command Inno Yodha Competition 2025-26

projects.name: LLM Application Deployment Tool
projects.summary: End-to-end scaffolding tool that auto-generates a polished interactive frontend for any LLM backend application and deploys it as a live public web app via GitHub Pages.
highlights: Built a tool that auto-generates a fully styled UI for any LLM backend application
Abstracts all frontend complexity -- users provide backend LLM logic, tool handles UI generation and deployment
Automated the complete deployment pipeline from backend code to live public URL via GitHub Pages

projects.name: EVA - Enhanced Visitor Assistant Robot
projects.summary: Developing an autonomous visitor assistant robot using ROS and computer vision for navigation and interaction.
highlights: Created URDF model for accurate simulation and control
Integrated SLAM and path planning algorithms for autonomous movement
Optimized NLP models with university data for context-aware conversations using Whisper API and LLaMA
Developing animatronic face for natural human-robot interactions

projects.name: Muse - AI Music Generation System
projects.summary: AI-powered music composition system using LSTM, VAE, and GAN for automated music creation.
highlights: Collected and preprocessed over 100,000 MIDI files
Implemented LSTM-based music generator for melody composition
Utilized GAN-based model to enhance compositions
Generated over 1,000 unique compositions

projects.name: NotePro - Adaptive Notes Generator
projects.summary: AI-based tool to auto-generate structured notes from online lectures using NLP.
highlights: Used NER and BART-based models for summarization
Integrated speech-to-text and topic modeling
Deployed to cloud, reducing processing time by 30%
Achieved 90% summarization accuracy
